title: Story: widget pipeline hardening (synthetic-proven)
body:
## User Story

As a maintainer I want the widget pipeline hardened.

## Acceptance

- [x] **AC#1** — gate A refuses malformed input — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-1) covered by #9101
- [x] **AC#2** — gate B blocks start when mapping missing — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-2) covered by #9102
- [x] **AC#3** — close gate verifies every criterion — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-3) covered by #9103
- [x] **AC#4** — auto-fill retries up to K then escalates — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-4) covered by #9103
- [x] **AC#5** — runner rejects skipped live tests — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-5) covered by #9104
- [x] **AC#6** — child wrapped in evaluator gate — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-6) covered by #9105
- [x] **AC#7** — spec doc exists and is the SSOT — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-7) covered by #9106
- [x] **AC#8** — runner accepts prior-failure hint — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-8) covered by #9104
- [x] **AC#10** — instrumentation row appended per run — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9001#issuecomment-9) covered by #9105

## Out of Scope

- the v2 redesign
